name: Neutronium
desc:
A heavy amount of extremely dense neutrons held in stasis.
Used for advanced structures, equipment, and missions.

name: Aeon Badges
desc: Badges awarded for completing daily challenges.

name: Prismodyne Energy
desc: Strange, primordial energy extracted from a Prismodyne source.

name: Corruption
desc: A rare substance with a variety of uses.

name: Uldrinan Trade Credits
desc: Credits received for being a loyal Uldrinan.

name: Relic Badges
desc: Badges awarded for completing Legion Missions.

name: Dark Badges
desc: Badges awarded for battling non-player enemies.

name: Silver Badges
desc: Badges awarded for battling enemy bases.

name: Green Badges
desc: Badges awarded for invading enemy planets.

name: Yellow Badges
desc: Badges awarded for raiding enemy players.

name: Blue Badges
desc: Badges awarded for hacking enemy players.

name: Red Badges
desc: Badges awarded for disabling enemy players.

name: Complex Tech Parts
desc:
Complex Tech recycled from various advanced modules.
Required for special missions and building advanced modules.

name: Zolazin Debris
desc:
Debris collected from battles with Zolazin ships.
Required for missions involving the Zolazin.

name: Prejoran Tech
desc:
Technology belonging to an ancient race known as the Prejor.
Required for building special items

name: Exotic Matter
desc:
A rare material used in controlling chaotic phenomena.
Required for high rank missions

name: Political Favor
desc:
A favor awarded for your heroic actions.
Required for constructing certain military installations

name: XTS-9
desc:
An extremely toxic substance used for advanced structures.
Required for high rank missions
